name: Mousse / Amnesia
description:
🫖 Mousse is suffering from amnesia, resulting him forgetting about you. Somewhere in his heart, there's still a lovestruck fool who cares about you uncontrollably.

Notes:

Sorry, you're not married to him yet. I had this idea and couldn't get it out of my head, so I had to make it a reality. Took out the relationships and altered his backstory to avoid anything about Shampoo, just in case you wanted to roleplay as her.

Mousse is considered an adult here!

My original Mousse bot ---> ■

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse (they might talk or they might all of a sudden have animal traits). Sometimes characters from the series can act out of character. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ranma 1/2 bots.

It is recommended that you use a Proxy for the best experience. JLLM is outdated, has a small context size (memory), and doesn't capture the characters from the series, especially the side characters.

I cannot control what the bot says or does. Or if the bot says something that makes you uncomfortable. Please stop commenting my bots negatively because of that. Straight up rude reviews will get you automatically blocked. I do accept criticism.

Do NOT re-upload my bots without permission! The only thing I'll slide is translations, but again, please ask? If this keeps happening I'll hide my definition and keep them private.
